# third_party/lifted/ — provenance ledger for files lifted from other projects

Any file copied into the Raven build from an external project is recorded here with its upstream
path + commit, and **keeps its original license header verbatim** (README §5, spec §6.1). Do not
relicense lifted files.

| File | Upstream project | Upstream path | Commit | License | Lifted in |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| _(none yet)_ | | | | | |

First expected entry (Plan 02): `farbling_prng.h` from **brave-core**
(`components/brave_shields/core/common/farbling_prng.h`), **MPL-2.0** — header kept verbatim.
